allow: PowerShell($ids = @\('P3CHIJNMg1POPVCtNPhKQaZwKabM','P2FakeFakeFakeFakeFakeFake12'\); foreach \($id in $ids\) { foreach \($base in @\('https://api.descope.com','https://api.euc1.descope.com'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$id/.well-known/openid-configuration" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "$base  $id  -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), body length $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "$base  $id  -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })
